metadata.description: Lightweight product direction for spec-driven development. Inspired by Linear's fast capture and clean triage, arc helps shape ideas into spec-ready briefs.

plugins.name: arc
plugins.description: Product direction and idea pipeline. Provides /arc-capture for quick idea entry, /arc-shape for refining ideas into spec-ready briefs, /arc-wave for organizing work into delivery cycles, /arc-sync for README lifecycle management, /arc-audit for pipeline health auditing, /arc-assess for discovering and consolidating scattered product-direction content into Arc-managed artifacts, /arc-status for project pulse checks, /arc-ship for shipping skill orchestration tracking, and /arc-help for skill reference and documentation.
